title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Cyient Capital India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
